event: View of the Church of Saint Pierre de Montmartre
symbols: church building — the house of God and gathering place of the faithful
solitary figure — the individual pilgrim before the house of worship
description: A view of a large church complex with prominent domes and a bell tower rising against an overcast sky. Bare trees stand in front of the building, and a low fence or wall marks the foreground. A small solitary dark figure stands near the church entrance. The surrounding buildings are rendered in muted whites and grays. The overall atmosphere is quiet and wintry.
